'''razhojo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:xianbing|xianbing]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-zh-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xianbing|xianbing]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| razhojo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ræzhejeth|ræzhejeth]] || [[word:ræzhejej|ræzhejej]] || [[word:ræzhejesh|ræzhejesh]] || [[word:ræzheje|ræzheje]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:razhozhojoth|razhozhojoth]] || [[word:razhozhojoj|razhozhojoj]] || [[word:razhozhojosh|razhozhojosh]] || [[word:razhozhojo|razhozhojo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:razhojoth|razhojoth]] || [[word:razhojoj|razhojoj]] || [[word:razhojosh|razhojosh]] || [[word:razhojo|razhojo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:razhofjoth|razhofjoth]] || [[word:razhofjoj|razhofjoj]] || [[word:razhofjosh|razhofjosh]] || [[word:razhofjof|razhofjof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:razhojotho|razhojotho]] || [[word:razhojojo|razhojojo]] || [[word:razhojosho|razhojosho]] || [[word:razhojoko|razhojoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:razhojoth|razhojoth]] || [[word:razhojoj|razhojoj]] || [[word:razhojosh|razhojosh]] || [[word:razhojo|razhojo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:razhojothol|razhojothol]] || [[word:razhojojol|razhojojol]] || [[word:razhojoshol|razhojoshol]] || [[word:razhojokol|razhojokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:razhojothotho|razhojothotho]] || [[word:razhojojojo|razhojojojo]] || [[word:razhojoshosho|razhojoshosho]] || [[word:razhojoko|razhojoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:razhojothon|razhojothon]] || [[word:razhojojon|razhojojon]] || [[word:razhojoshon|razhojoshon]] || [[word:razhojokon|razhojokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:razhojothoro|razhojothoro]] || [[word:razhojojoro|razhojojoro]] || [[word:razhojoshoro|razhojoshoro]] || [[word:razhojokoro|razhojokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
